cleavage agent: searches were performed with a tolerance on mass measurement of 0.02 Da for precursor and 10 ppm for fragment ions, against a composite target decoy database...fused with the sequences of recombinant trypsin
collision energy: fragmented in the HCD collision cell with normalized collision energy of 35%
enrichment method: immunoprecipitated the MHC II molecules from a splenic DC tumor cell line
fractionation method: fractionated onto a C18 reverse-phase column
fragmentation method: fragmented in the HCD collision cell
instrument: coupled to a Q‐Exactive mass spectrometer
labeling: proteomics experiments are always either labeled or label-free
